summary: Tested Admin Reference Tokens Panel feature. Backend: 16/16 tests passed - all admin endpoints work correctly (GET/DELETE/POST resend). Frontend: Admin panel visible only for admin users, shows FS#, client name, status badges (Pendente/Submetido/Expirado), location, date. Filters work correctly. Reenviar button only for pending tokens. Submitted references show green reference value.
seed_data_creation: Used existing reference tokens in DB (FS#364 pending, FS#356 submitted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Reference Tokens Panel is fully implemented. Key endpoints: GET/DELETE /api/admin/reference-tokens, POST /api/admin/resend-reference-email/{id}. All require admin auth. Frontend tab 'Ref. Internas' visible only for admin users in TechnicalReports.jsx. Filters: status (todos/pendente/submetido), cliente_filter (text search). Status badges: Pendente (amber), Submetido (green), Expirado (red). Reenviar button only for pending. Submitted refs show green 'Ref: value'.

tests: GET /api/admin/reference-tokens returns all tokens with FS info
cliente_filter=560 returns only tokens with '560' in client name
Resend for already submitted token returns 400
Resend for pending token succeeds (or SMTP error in preview env)
Token data includes numero_assistencia, cliente_nome, local_intervencao
Status flags (used, expired) correctly determine badge type
Submitted tokens have non-empty referencia value

verified: 'Ref. Internas' tab visible for admin user (pedro)
'Ref. Internas' tab HIDDEN for non-admin user (Nuno)
Admin sees 5 tabs, non-admin sees 4 tabs
Panel shows 'Referências Internas' title with link icon
Client filter input with placeholder 'Filtrar por cliente...'
Location displayed with map pin icon
Reenviar button only for pending tokens
Delete button (trash icon) for all tokens
Filter by status=pendente shows only pending items
